name: Quick Assist
description: [Quick Assist](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1209) is a remote assistance tool primarily for Microsoft Windows, although a macOS version also exists. [Quick Assist](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1209) allows for remote screen sharing and, with end user approval, remote control and command execution on the enabling device.(Citation: Microsoft Storm-1811 2024)(Citation: Microsoft Quick Ass
